insights.facility: At facility level, the formula is applied directly: committed_facility_amt / collateral_value × 100. Each facility has its own committed and collateral amounts.
insights.counterparty: The formula doesn't change — only the scope does. We sum committed amounts and collateral values across all facilities for a counterparty, then apply the same division.
insights.desk: Same formula, different scope: find all facilities assigned to this desk via the enterprise business taxonomy (tree_level = 3), then SUM(committed) / SUM(collateral) × 100.
insights.portfolio: Same formula, wider scope: traverse the hierarchy upward to find the portfolio node (tree_level = 2), then gather all desks beneath it. Aggregate all their facilities.
insights.lob: Same formula, widest scope: starting from the business segment (tree_level = 1), recursively traverse all child nodes to collect every facility in the tree.

insights.facility: At facility level, DSCR is computed directly from the facility's financial data: Cashflow (NOI or EBITDA) divided by Total Debt Service.
insights.counterparty: Group facilities by counterparty_id. The counterparty DSCR is an exposure-weighted average: Σ(DSCR × committed_amt) / Σ(committed_amt). This reflects the real risk: larger facilities carry more weight.
insights.desk: Resolve the desk via enterprise_business_taxonomy (tree_level = 3). Find all facilities assigned to this desk, then compute the exposure-weighted average DSCR.
insights.portfolio: Traverse parent_segment_id to find the portfolio node (tree_level = 2). Collect all desks, gather their facilities, and compute the exposure-weighted average DSCR across the full portfolio.
insights.lob: Recursive parent_segment_id traversal from the business segment (tree_level = 1). The final DSCR is the exposure-weighted average across every facility in the entire segment.
